Victory Road, Kanto (location)

This is the Pokémon Location guide for Victory Road in Kanto.

Choose which generation of games you're playing to see the Pokémon and capture methods.

  • Generation 7
  • 1F-3F
  • Main
  • Generation 4
  • 1F
  • Generation 3
  • 1F
  • 2F
  • 3F
  • Generation 2
  • 1F
  • Generation 1
  • 1F
  • 2F
  • 3F

Generation 7 - 1F-3F

Walking

Walking in grass or a cave

Pokémon Games Rarity Levels Details
Golbat LGPLGE 15% 41-46
Machoke LGPLGE 15% 41-46
Graveler LGPLGE 15% 41-46
Zubat LGPLGE 10% 41-46
Machop LGPLGE 10% 41-46
Geodude LGPLGE 10% 41-46
Onix LGPLGE 10% 41-46
Rhyhorn LGPLGE 10% 41-46
Rhydon LGPLGE 5% 41-46
Special
Hitmonlee LGPLGE RARE 41-46
Hitmonchan LGPLGE RARE 41-46
Chansey LGPLGE RARE 41-46

Generation 7 - Main

Interact

Static Pokémon that attacks when interacted with

Pokémon Games Rarity Levels Details
